name: designer-os
description: Turn a brand book into a production design system. Validates a structured YAML brand book, derives a three-layer token system, scaffolds a Next.js + Shadcn UI project, and installs an inspect-only QA harness.
author: aiden150

skills.name: design-from-brand
skills.description: Primary scaffold skill. Takes a brand-book YAML file, validates it against the schema, derives color scales and tokens, scaffolds the full Next.js project, generates documentation, installs the QA harness, and deploys to Vercel.

skills.name: feature-build
skills.description: Per-feature iteration skill. Use after initial scaffold to add pages, components, or patterns. Delegates to the design-agent, enforces token rules, runs tsc, deploys, and hands off with a live URL.

agents.name: design-agent
agents.description: Builds product features following the brand's design system rules. Reads AGENTS.md, follows token and component constraints, runs tsc before declaring done, and deploys via Vercel.

agents.name: qa-orchestrator
agents.description: Full QA sweep: runs code-scanner + token-auditor in parallel, gates on build, then runs visual-diff + a11y-checker in parallel. Aggregates findings into a structured JSON report.

agents.name: code-scanner
agents.description: Static analysis only. Finds hardcoded hex colors, raw pixel values, and non-token patterns in component code. Read-only.

agents.name: token-auditor
agents.description: Verifies that every token in globals.css is documented in docs/ and visible in a token viewer page. Flags drift between the three locations. Read-only.

agents.name: visual-diff
agents.description: Captures Playwright screenshots and runs pixelmatch against the committed baseline in screenshots/. Reports routes where the diff exceeds 0.5% of pixels. Read-only.

agents.name: a11y-checker
agents.description: Runs axe-core via Playwright against every captured route. Reports color contrast, focus indicators, keyboard navigation, ARIA labels, and image alternatives. Read-only.

hooks.name: check-design-tokens
hooks.description: Warns when hardcoded hex, rgb(), or Tailwind color defaults are written to component files.

hooks.name: check-spacing
hooks.description: Warns when raw pixel values are written outside globals.css.

hooks.name: check-completeness
hooks.description: Warns when a new component file is created without a sibling story or test file.

hooks.name: protect-files
hooks.description: Blocks writes to .env files, lockfiles, and generated CSS. Hard block — not a warning.
